sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain to palpation of the lumbar spine. The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports weakness in their right leg. The patient reports a positive straight leg raise. The patient reports back pain. The patient reports weight gain. The patient experienced tingling. The patient has a sweet tooth. The patient reports back pain.
medical_concepts: pain to palpation of the lumbar spine

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The doctor appreciates a 2 out of 6 systolic ejection murmur. The patient's right strength is 4 out of 5. The patient's left strength is 5 out of 5. The patient is currently taking metformin. The patient took Tylenol. The patient took Ibuprofen. The patient tried ice. The patient tried heat.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The doctor assesses the patient has an acute lumbar strain. The patient has diabetes. The patient has back pain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered a refill of lisinopril 20 milligrams once a day. The doctor orders physical therapy. The doctor orders an MRI. The doctor wants to see the patient in a couple weeks. The doctor prescribes meloxicam 15 milligrams once a day.

medical_concepts: pain to palpation of the lumbar spine
